intent_tree: {"将MP3音频文件中的语音转换为文字": {"选择清晰的音频文件": {}, "将MP3格式转换为WAV格式": {}, "使用语音识别技术提取音频中的文字": {}, "保存提取的文字到文本文件": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "安装依赖库（SpeechRecognition, pydub, ffmpeg）"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载MP3音频文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "将MP3音频文件转换为WAV格式以提高兼容性"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "初始化语音识别器"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "从WAV文件中读取音频数据"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "使用Google语音识别API提取音频中的文字"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "将提取的文字保存到文本文件中"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "处理可能的异常（如网络问题、音频质量问题）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "建议优化音频质量（降噪、标准化音量等）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "分片处理长音频以适应API限制"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "dependency"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "convert"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "initialize"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "loadAudio"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "recognizeSpeech"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "saveText"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node8", "type": "handleErrors"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "suggestImprovements"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node10", "type": "processLongAudio"}]}
